scene: A gouache painting of a twilight caravan courtyard that opens onto a cosmic pasture: the clear focal point is a warmly lit cutaway caravan interior whose doorway frames an adult celestial woman in flowing blue-green robes seated on a golden star as if it has drifted down to rest beside the threshold. Around her, several goats wander in and out of the sandy yard, their coats painted with loose modernist stripe-and-arc markings in mustard, teal, orange, red, and blue, echoing abstract signage on the caravan wall; a single thin black dash appears as a minimalist hanging bar above the doorway. Inside, the caravan keeps its enchanted clutter—checkerboard floor, chandelier, fireplace, red chair, ladder, indoor tree with autumn leaves, red rotary phone, lizard, model sailboat, and spotted dog—while in the cool shadows beyond the firelight stands a towering blue winged armoured statue with feather-like metallic spines, rendered as a protective guardian rather than a threat. Overhead, the night deepens into indigo space with soft planets and a ringed world, while along the roofline and fence appear angular red-and-gold shard motifs like painted trim. The gouache surface is matte and tactile, with visible brushwork binding the cosmic sky, pastoral animals, geometric patterns, and eccentric interior into one storybook world of warm firelight against cool celestial shadow.
prompt: Create one gouache painting - matte opaque paint, confident visible brushstrokes, soft blends and chalky texture, like a mid-century book illustration. The image is a 16:9 music blog header. Around her, several goats wander in and out of the sandy yard, their coats painted with loose modernist stripe-and-arc markings in mustard, teal, orange, red, and blue, echoing abstract signage on the caravan wall; a single thin black dash appears as a minimalist hanging bar above the doorway. Inside, the caravan keeps its enchanted clutter—checkerboard floor, chandelier, fireplace, red chair, ladder, indoor tree with autumn leaves, red rotary phone, lizard, model sailboat, and spotted dog—while in the cool shadows beyond the firelight stands a towering blue winged armoured statue with feather-like metallic spines, rendered as a protective guardian rather than a threat. Overhead, the night deepens into indigo space with soft planets and a ringed world, while along the roofline and fence appear angular red-and-gold shard motifs like painted trim. The gouache surface is matte and tactile, with visible brushwork binding the cosmic sky, pastoral animals, geometric patterns, and eccentric interior into one storybook world of warm firelight against cool celestial shadow. Weave in recognisable elements taken from the 8 uploaded album covers: source 1: adult woman seated on a golden star in a planetary night sky; source 2: bold striped geometric arcs and bars in mustard, red, teal, orange, and blue; source 3: angular red-and-gold shard motif on a black ground; source 4: a cluster of goats in a sandy outdoor pen; source 5: vertically fragmented adult portrait in a voluminous red garment; source 6: blue winged biomechanical guardian figure with glowing eyes; source 7: a single thin black horizontal line; source 8: whimsical cutaway caravan interior with fireplace, chandelier, tree, red chair, phone, lizard, and dog. Transform the subjects, figures, creatures, objects, and symbols depicted in the uploaded covers so they stay recognisable, and place them all inside one cohesive world with a single shared setting and consistent light. Paint each album motif into the scene as a naturally belonging painted element - loose and gestural but unmistakable. Composition: A classic painterly composition - a landscape, interior, or figure study with a clear focal hierarchy. Colour direction: midnight blue, indigo, golden ochre, mustard yellow, brick red - mixed painterly colour drawn from the sleeves, warm lights against cool shadows. Mood: whimsical, dreamlike, theatrical. Keep the scene safe and tasteful: feature only adults (no children, infants, or minors), and show no gore, wounds, body horror, medical or anatomical imagery, blank or milky eyes, nudity, or sexual content. Reinterpret any such source motif abstractly, and suggest rather than exactly replicate the likeness of any identifiable real person. Do not include any text, letters, words, numbers, captions, titles, logos, watermarks, or signage anywhere in the image. Avoid: readable text, letters, words, numbers, captions, titles, logos, watermarks, signage, grid layout, contact sheet, evenly tiled squares, raw album-cover thumbnails, collage of separate panels, photorealistic photograph, DSLR photo, 3D render, CGI, octane render, glossy 3D rendering, camera depth of field, lens bokeh, realistic skin texture, a posed group of people arranged for the camera, objects displayed on tables, trays, or plinths, one giant central sculpture as the centrepiece of the scene. Bold, confident, gallery-quality print design with a strong sense of place.
